column1: # mapping.example.tsv — TEMPLATE for the public-mirror scrub dictionary.
# Copy this to `mapping.tsv` and replace the ALL-CAPS placeholders with your
# own internal identifiers. `mapping.tsv` is git-excluded from the public
# mirror output (add an `exclude` line for it, as shown) so the dictionary of
# internal strings never ships publicly — only the replacement vocabulary and
# Line types (TAB-separated), applied in file order (put longer sources first):
#   deny <TAB> REGEX     (leak gate fails on any case-insensitive match)
#   keep <TAB> REGEX     (exempts a line that also matches a deny)
#   exclude <TAB> PATH   (drop from the public mirror output)
# ---- keep (real public assets you WANT to keep referenced) ----
# ---- exclude (dropped from the public mirror output) ----
